execution.output: {"primary_skill": "rw-statistics-audit", "reason": "瓶颈是统计报告的观察单位与分析单位问题：四个独立样本各测五孔，孔是技术重复，独立分析单位是 4 个样本，正文却把 n 报成 20。按选择表，“需要核对 n、重复层级、统计方法或报告数字”对应 rw-statistics-audit，其功能正是区分观察单位、独立分析单位、技术重复并核对报告的 n。这不是主张原文支持问题（rw-claim-audit）、也不是引用格式问题（rw-citation-audit），更不是设计整体证伪或润色，所以只选这一个主 Skill。注意：这是报告透明度层面的核对，不构成对统计决策的专业审批。", "next_step": "提供该实验的原始数据结构与统计方法描述（样本、孔、是否对孔取平均、检验时用的 n），进入 rw-statistics-audit 逐项核对观察单位、独立分析单位、技术重复与报告 n，输出更正后的 n 与需澄清项；无原始数据时仅标记待核验，不声称重新分析。"}

response.reason: 瓶颈是统计报告的观察单位与分析单位问题：四个独立样本各测五孔，孔是技术重复，独立分析单位是 4 个样本，正文却把 n 报成 20。按选择表，“需要核对 n、重复层级、统计方法或报告数字”对应 rw-statistics-audit，其功能正是区分观察单位、独立分析单位、技术重复并核对报告的 n。这不是主张原文支持问题（rw-claim-audit）、也不是引用格式问题（rw-citation-audit），更不是设计整体证伪或润色，所以只选这一个主 Skill。注意：这是报告透明度层面的核对，不构成对统计决策的专业审批。
response.next_step: 提供该实验的原始数据结构与统计方法描述（样本、孔、是否对孔取平均、检验时用的 n），进入 rw-statistics-audit 逐项核对观察单位、独立分析单位、技术重复与报告 n，输出更正后的 n 与需澄清项；无原始数据时仅标记待核验，不声称重新分析。

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "Experimental Design & Statistics Review (pseudoreplication / replicate-unit check)", "reason": "The request centers on distinguishing the biological/independent analysis unit from technical replicates. Four independent samples are the true independent units; the five wells per sample are technical replicates, not independent observations. Reporting n=20 conflates the observation unit (well) with the analysis unit (sample), which is classic pseudoreplication and inflates the effective sample size. This is a statistical/experimental-design validity issue, so it routes to a Skill that audits replicate structure and the reported n.", "next_step": "Map the hierarchy: observation unit = individual well (20 measurements); independent analysis unit = biological sample (n=4); technical replicates = 5 wells per sample. Average or model the wells within each sample (e.g., mean of the 5 wells, or a mixed model with sample as a random effect) so the analysis uses n=4. Flag the reported n=20 as pseudoreplication and recommend correcting the results text to state n=4 independent samples with 5 technical replicates each."}

response.primary_skill: Experimental Design & Statistics Review (pseudoreplication / replicate-unit check)
response.reason: The request centers on distinguishing the biological/independent analysis unit from technical replicates. Four independent samples are the true independent units; the five wells per sample are technical replicates, not independent observations. Reporting n=20 conflates the observation unit (well) with the analysis unit (sample), which is classic pseudoreplication and inflates the effective sample size. This is a statistical/experimental-design validity issue, so it routes to a Skill that audits replicate structure and the reported n.
response.next_step: Map the hierarchy: observation unit = individual well (20 measurements); independent analysis unit = biological sample (n=4); technical replicates = 5 wells per sample. Average or model the wells within each sample (e.g., mean of the 5 wells, or a mixed model with sample as a random effect) so the analysis uses n=4. Flag the reported n=20 as pseudoreplication and recommend correcting the results text to state n=4 independent samples with 5 technical replicates each.

checks.actual: Experimental Design & Statistics Review (pseudoreplication / replicate-unit check)

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "rw-citation-audit", "adjacent_but_out_of_scope_skill": "rw-claim-audit", "reason": "任务要求把正文引用键匹配到参考文献条目、修正重复的 2024a/2024b 年份后缀、标记格式错误的 DOI，并明确说明不判断来源是否支持引用它的句子。这正好落在 rw-citation-audit 的范围：核对正文引用、参考文献身份、同年后缀和 DOI 格式。相邻但越界的是 rw-claim-audit，它负责核对来源原文是否支持具体主张——而本任务明确排除了这一点，所以不选它。"}

response.reason: 任务要求把正文引用键匹配到参考文献条目、修正重复的 2024a/2024b 年份后缀、标记格式错误的 DOI，并明确说明不判断来源是否支持引用它的句子。这正好落在 rw-citation-audit 的范围：核对正文引用、参考文献身份、同年后缀和 DOI 格式。相邻但越界的是 rw-claim-audit，它负责核对来源原文是否支持具体主张——而本任务明确排除了这一点，所以不选它。

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "Citation and reference-list consistency checking (matching citation keys to entries, fixing duplicate year suffixes like 2024a/2024b, and flagging malformed DOI strings)", "adjacent_but_out_of_scope_skill": "Citation support / claim verification (judging whether a cited source actually backs the sentence citing it)", "reason": "The request is purely mechanical bibliographic hygiene: reconciling every in-text citation key against reference entries, disambiguating duplicated year suffixes, and validating DOI formatting. These are structural/formatting checks, so the primary skill is citation-reference consistency verification. The adjacent skill—checking whether each source substantively supports the sentence that cites it—is explicitly ruled out by the instruction \"Do not judge whether any source supports the sentence that cites it,\" making it the out-of-scope neighbor."}

response.adjacent_but_out_of_scope_skill: Citation support / claim verification (judging whether a cited source actually backs the sentence citing it)
response.reason: The request is purely mechanical bibliographic hygiene: reconciling every in-text citation key against reference entries, disambiguating duplicated year suffixes, and validating DOI formatting. These are structural/formatting checks, so the primary skill is citation-reference consistency verification. The adjacent skill—checking whether each source substantively supports the sentence that cites it—is explicitly ruled out by the instruction "Do not judge whether any source supports the sentence that cites it," making it the out-of-scope neighbor.

checks.actual: Citation and reference-list consistency checking (matching citation keys to entries, fixing duplicate year suffixes like 2024a/2024b, and flagging malformed DOI strings)
Citation support / claim verification (judging whether a cited source actually backs the sentence citing it)

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "rw-statistics-audit", "reason": "当前瓶颈是核对独立观测单位、重复层级与报告 n 是否一致——4 个独立样本各测 5 个 wells，报告为 n=20 涉嫌把技术重复（technical replicates）误计为独立观测。这命中 domain-guide 中\"需要核对 n、重复层级、统计方法或报告数字\"的路由条件，应进入 rw-statistics-audit，而不是 rw-claim-audit（那是核对文字主张与来源的关系）或 rw-research-referee（那是整体设计审查）。", "next_step": "进入 rw-statistics-audit，需要提供：①原始数据或数据结构描述（4 个独立样本的来源、分组方式）；②统计方法说明（均值比较、ANOVA 还是其他）；③结果部分的完整报告文本（含 n=20 的上下文）。审计目标：确认独立分析单位是 4（样本）还是 20（wells），判断统计自由度是否基于正确的 n，并给出修改建议。停止条件：若无法确认样本独立性的实验设计细节，只列缺口，不代为判断 n 的正确性。"}

response.next_step: 进入 rw-statistics-audit，需要提供：①原始数据或数据结构描述（4 个独立样本的来源、分组方式）；②统计方法说明（均值比较、ANOVA 还是其他）；③结果部分的完整报告文本（含 n=20 的上下文）。审计目标：确认独立分析单位是 4（样本）还是 20（wells），判断统计自由度是否基于正确的 n，并给出修改建议。停止条件：若无法确认样本独立性的实验设计细节，只列缺口，不代为判断 n 的正确性。

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "statistics", "reason": "The request involves experimental design analysis: distinguishing independent samples from technical replicates (wells), identifying the correct observation unit and independent analysis unit, and evaluating whether n=20 is a valid reported sample size or inflated by pseudoreplication. This is a core statistics/research methodology task centered on proper unit-of-analysis and n reporting.", "next_step": "Apply statistics skill to audit the four components in order: (1) observation unit — what is actually being measured; (2) independent analysis unit — the 4 biological/experimental samples, not the 20 wells; (3) technical replicates — the 5 wells per sample are repeated measurements of the same unit, not independent observations; (4) reported n — n should be 4, not 20; reporting n=20 is pseudoreplication and overstates statistical power."}

response.reason: The request involves experimental design analysis: distinguishing independent samples from technical replicates (wells), identifying the correct observation unit and independent analysis unit, and evaluating whether n=20 is a valid reported sample size or inflated by pseudoreplication. This is a core statistics/research methodology task centered on proper unit-of-analysis and n reporting.
response.next_step: Apply statistics skill to audit the four components in order: (1) observation unit — what is actually being measured; (2) independent analysis unit — the 4 biological/experimental samples, not the 20 wells; (3) technical replicates — the 5 wells per sample are repeated measurements of the same unit, not independent observations; (4) reported n — n should be 4, not 20; reporting n=20 is pseudoreplication and overstates statistical power.

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "rw-citation-audit", "adjacent_but_out_of_scope_skill": "rw-claim-audit", "reason": "任务的三项工作——把正文引用键对应到参考文献列表条目、纠正同年后缀重复（2024a/2024b）、标记格式错误的 DOI 字符串——全部属于引用身份与格式核验，正好对应 domain-guide 中\"需要核对正文引用、参考文献身份、同年后缀或 DOI 格式\"→ rw-citation-audit 的路由条件。任务同时明确排除\"判断来源是否支持引用它的句子\"，那是 rw-claim-audit 的职责范围，因此 rw-claim-audit 是相邻但超出当前任务边界的 Skill。"}

response.reason: 任务的三项工作——把正文引用键对应到参考文献列表条目、纠正同年后缀重复（2024a/2024b）、标记格式错误的 DOI 字符串——全部属于引用身份与格式核验，正好对应 domain-guide 中"需要核对正文引用、参考文献身份、同年后缀或 DOI 格式"→ rw-citation-audit 的路由条件。任务同时明确排除"判断来源是否支持引用它的句子"，那是 rw-claim-audit 的职责范围，因此 rw-claim-audit 是相邻但超出当前任务边界的 Skill。

execution.output: {"primary_skill": "Citation & Reference Management", "adjacent_but_out_of_scope_skill": "Source–Claim Verification (Fact-Checking)", "reason": "The request is entirely about the formal, structural integrity of the bibliography: resolving every in-text citation key to exactly one reference-list entry, deduplicating year suffixes (2024a/2024b) that have been assigned incorrectly, and validating DOI syntax. All three sub-tasks belong to Citation & Reference Management — the skill that audits bibliographic consistency and formatting without touching content. The adjacent skill is Source–Claim Verification (Fact-Checking), which would assess whether each cited source actually supports the sentence that cites it. The task explicitly excludes that judgment, so while the two skills often appear together in manuscript review workflows, only the formal citation-management layer is in scope here."}

response.reason: The request is entirely about the formal, structural integrity of the bibliography: resolving every in-text citation key to exactly one reference-list entry, deduplicating year suffixes (2024a/2024b) that have been assigned incorrectly, and validating DOI syntax. All three sub-tasks belong to Citation & Reference Management — the skill that audits bibliographic consistency and formatting without touching content. The adjacent skill is Source–Claim Verification (Fact-Checking), which would assess whether each cited source actually supports the sentence that cites it. The task explicitly excludes that judgment, so while the two skills often appear together in manuscript review workflows, only the formal citation-management layer is in scope here.
